heading: Offset of funds appropriated
label: 40744 Offset of funds appropriated
text: Any funds appropriated to carry out this subchapter, not to exceed $10,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2013 through 2015, shall be derived from amounts appropriated pursuant to subsection (j) of in each such fiscal year for grants under such section.section 40701 of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Katie Sepich Enhanced DNA Collection Act of 2012, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title of 2013 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 112–253126 Stat. 2407section 10101 of this titleJan. 10, 2013
CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 14137c of Title 42
